Course Title: AI-Generated Code in Production: Hidden Risks
Category: Technology & Telecommunications: Information Technology, Science & Technology, Software, Hardware, Telecom
Who is this for: Software developers, programmers, application developers, software engineers, junior developers, coding team leads, technical leads
Team or Dept this is for: IT, Software Development, Engineering, DevOps, Quality Assurance
Description: Subtle vulnerabilities and logic flaws introduced by AI-assisted coding.
Prerequisites: A working knowledge of at least one programming language and a basic familiarity with software development practices are all you need to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify subtle vulnerabilities and logic flaws commonly introduced by AI-assisted coding tools, and explain the potential risks these issues pose in production environments. You will also apply practical techniques to review, test, and validate AI-generated code so that it meets the security and reliability standards required for real-world software deployment.
